---
layout: default
title: "Cabinet Clears Major Tech Schemes Amidst Political Shifts"
date: 2026-07-15T15:59:09.471214+00:00
summary: "The Union Cabinet approved massive semiconductor and mobile manufacturing outlays, while the INDIA bloc faces internal friction over key legislative bills"
run_time_ist: "9:29PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:29PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Cabinet approves major tech investments:</strong> The Union Cabinet cleared the ₹1.27 lakh crore India Semiconductor Mission 2.0 and a ₹62,500 crore mobile manufacturing scheme to bolster domestic electronics production.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxQek53STVHMDBLT0Q2dXNVejgyUW9ndDRDNEl3RWI1RUpXNGE4US1udzFIaGpDNU9VMXNIRGlvXzBPOFlFQ1ROR1kzMkU0WWMtOURPa2FpRXpUQ3NRTGxBZ1ZyRXFNbjI0SHJWSkJnLXVOUjdiTzhlcGNyMERnQ0gwX3dPNnhtUXNxcGZrQ3BUYTJlNWdMS1k2aTZ4M2lmN1FE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMibkFVX3lxTFBnMWs0WVBFYU1NUmZ0VmNqUjh5SHJnVGxLQm9xbWtrQ0ZpOGlxcmoyUW9vZnhPLTFlYTI1dDRRcWtVem1HaTIzOUl0UkViTzFBa21DNjlEdWhkYWNaOUh2R21tSnBlZkU2Wlg0UXVR?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I20</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxPOWE5YUtiSUI1VjlvZ0RaeU1TdzJRN3FNaUtsOGNJeVRlZ052MjM3bXVsbk5XeDNlRkNJaFRTUWtOSlpQRm91cjNqWnhQZUIzVExGb01FNEx3dU42cEVFbTN1aGF4Y281ZVRWSUJNWkxpMkx3LVFWcXFUY3dyajBsOURRVGFFQzBHTUJHeHluOVhGdHViQ01LN3Q5UHd3V05VX1E?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I24</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>INDIA bloc faces legislative rift:</strong> The NCP (SP) has signaled potential support for the upcoming Women’s Reservation and Delimitation Bills, causing friction within the opposition alliance despite denials of backdoor negotiations with the BJP.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi--?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Trade policy update:</strong> India has amended its foreign trade policy to strictly prohibit the import of goods manufactured using forced labour.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Bihar political realignment:</strong> The Jan Suraaj party suffered a setback ahead of the Bankipur by-election as several key leaders defected to the BJP.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxQQnlOZTRLalFZdkFmYVJvV2xZUlNraXc2ZmVIOEwwMko0bXhRNXNfTDFiZGhoX1FEZWZUZXlkMm93Tmt0R3g0WmRjQjhUZnlzTkhyaExjX1pPRHhBQWJqbnN2TTJwNTFrSkxLMGk0c1FzN0YtTERQLTZnS0xDLU5PQUxXVzZhSWM2ME1YY01sRDhka2lGQ1RrTkhUY0lKdDZ0M2luR2lUaHViZjNfSnRwLUxDU1pMQ3Z4Q3c?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Punjab leadership concerns:</strong> Rahul Gandhi has intervened to address escalating infighting within the Punjab Congress unit, which threatens the party&#x27;s preparations for the 2027 assembly elections.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W8</a></span></li>
</ul>

Announcing the decisions, Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw said the expanded semiconductor missi - LinkedIn</a> LinkedIn</li>
